text.title: MCP Server Implementation — TypeScript and Python — Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree the agent walks before applying mcp-server-implementation. Branches name observable input fields; every leaf points at a rule id from 01-core-rules.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If preconditions hold AND no Skip-If trigger fires (input.applies_if == true AND input.skip_if == false)?

branch.question: Are the Prerequisites artefacts present AND well-typed (input.prereqs_present == true)?
Do rules 1-3 from 01-core-rules pass on the input bundle (input.rules_1_to_3_pass == true)?
Does the draft artefact validate against 02-output-contract (input.contract_valid == true)?

text.example: applies_if=true, skip_if=false → q-inputs: prereqs_present=true → q-rules: rules_1_to_3_pass=true → q-output: contract_valid=true → accept-and-handoff (ref r5-validate-produced-code).
